name: Arceus
description:
Here she is! made the default greeting the one to go with giratina, the second one is better for solo. To prevent giratina from speaking and having to delete the message, go into a solo chat with arceus and convert to group for the people using SillyTavern.

For the people not using sillytavern, i'm almost finished the joined card, just looking through where i can cut down on tokens.

~is arceus technically a milf? Like. She has kids, so she counts, right?~
